# owloop Brand System

## Mascot
Ollie — a nocturnal owl who codes while you sleep.

## Voice
Calm, reliable, slightly whimsical; never hyper or corporate.

## Color palette
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Night | `#0b1026` | background |
| Amber | `#d4a025` | primary accent, headings |
| Moon | `#f2ecd8` | body text on dark |
| Dim | `#3a4270` | secondary/borders |
| Success | `#8fd19e` | positive states |
| Danger | `#e0777d` | warnings/errors |

## Typography
- UI: Geist or Inter
- Code: JetBrains Mono / system monospace

## Imagery
Night sky, moon phases, owl silhouette, infinite loop (∞).
